title: Firefox crashes when opening PDF preview
description: Opening a PDF in a private browsing window intermittently crashes after the preview toolbar loads.
stack_trace: TypeError: this.viewer is null at PdfViewer.render viewer.js:214

title: HTTP server returns 500 after malformed header
description: Requests containing an oversized folded header trigger a server error instead of a controlled 400 response.
stack_trace: java.lang.IllegalArgumentException: invalid header continuation at HeaderParser.parse(HeaderParser.java:87)

title: IDE freezes during Java autocomplete
description: Content assist hangs when a workspace contains cyclic project references and annotation processing is enabled.

title: Login form loses focus after password autofill
description: Password manager fills saved credentials but moves focus away from the submit button on slow pages.

title: Null pointer in module reload command
description: Reloading modules while a virtual host is disabled causes a null pointer exception and leaves the admin command incomplete.

title: Dark theme renders unreadable error marker text
description: Error marker labels use a low-contrast red foreground on dark theme backgrounds after the latest theme update.
